title: ornithoglossum zeyheri
intro: Ornithoglossum zeyheri, also known as the Zeyher's tongue orchid, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ornithoglossum zeyheri include its potential to reduce inflammation and combat infections, as well as its use in treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, but further research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
